title: Olympia Harley Table Knife (Pack of 12) & D691 Harley Cutlery Table Fork (Pack of 12)
features: Product 1: High-polish finish adds a premium touch to your table settings
Product 1: Double-step design on handle adds a unique look
Product 1: Ergonomic handle allows for secure and comfortable use
Product 1: 18/0 stainless steel prevents lost cutlery when used with magnetic saving systems
Product 2: High polish finish 18/0 stainless steel.
Product 2: Double step design on handle
description: From the manufacturer Olympia Harley Table Knife (Pack of 12) With its uncomplicated design, Olympia's Harley table knife is perfectly suited to informal table settings. Crisp, straight lines provide a minimalistic look whilst the weight and shape make for a comfortable dining experience. Pressed from solid 18/0 stainless steel, this cutlery is magnetic which makes it ideal for use with magnetised cutlery saving bin lids, helping to prevent how often cutlery needs replacing and, in turn, helps to save you money. Recommended Uses For Product Eating Brand Olympia Model Name Table Knife Special Feature Replaceable Blades Age Range Description Adult Olympia D691 Harley Cutlery Table Fork (Pack of 12) Harley is an uncomplicated design that is perfectly suited to restaurants and bars that offer fine food in an informal places. This Table fork from Olympia features crisp, straight lines and has a comfortable feel in the hand. As the knife is made from 18/0 stainless steel, it is magnetic and can be used with magnetised cutlery saving bin lids. Material Stainless Steel Color Silver Brand Olympia Number Of Pieces 1 Finish Type Polished
